title: Senior Teacher - Pune University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pune University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
